focus: maintainability + traceability overlays: skill_agent, agent_cross_runtime, feature_catalog_code, playbook_capability

findingsNew.title: Catalog and playbook omit the new gated code_graph_context capability
findingsNew.claim: The implementation and packet docs establish default-off edge-confidence and seeded-PPR behavior that can affect code_graph_context impact ranking when enabled, but the code-graph feature catalog and manual context playbook still describe only baseline context retrieval/readiness/trace behavior and provide no scenario for the gated flags.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked system-code-graph SKILL, README, feature catalog index/detail, manual playbook index/detail, mcp_server/lib README, and canonical OpenCode agent definitions for seeded-PPR or edge-confidence references; scoped grep found no matches in feature_catalog, manual_testing_playbook, or .opencode/agents.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The team may intentionally avoid promoting default-off experimental flags after a CUT verdict, but feature catalogs and manual playbooks are capability/validation inventories and are the expected traceability surfaces for gated behavior.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to no finding if CUT/default-off experimental branches are intentionally excluded from catalogs/playbooks by policy, or if a sibling manual scenario already covers code_graph_context with both gated flags enabled.

findingDetails.title: Catalog and playbook omit the new gated code_graph_context capability
findingDetails.scopeProof: Scoped grep for SPECKIT_CODE_GRAPH_SEEDED_PPR_RANKING|SEEDED_PPR|seeded PPR|seeded-PPR|edge confidence|confidence differentiation returned no matches under .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/feature_catalog/, .opencode/skills/system-code-graph/manual_testing_playbook/, or .opencode/agents/.

checklist_evidence.notes: Inherited from active P1-003; not re-adjudicated in iteration 4.

agent_cross_runtime.scopeProof: Scoped grep in .opencode/agents found stable generic code_graph references and no seeded-PPR or edge-confidence internal claims.

notes: Feature catalog and manual playbook lack gated seeded-PPR/edge-confidence coverage; agent definitions only carry generic stable code_graph tool references.
